content.claim: Early tracking systems including Hungary's gimnázium structure correlate with increased educational inequality and, less definitively, reduced mean performance across tracked countries.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: Correlation not confirmed as causation specific to 6-/8-year gimnázium versus tracking in general
Includes vocational/technical tracks alongside académie tracks in causal attribution
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
